prompt:
I'm starting a new session on my project. Here's the project state:

[HANDOFF.md content]
# AI Collaboration Handoff — Orbit
> Read this at the start of every new session.

## Project Overview
Name: Orbit
Description: A macOS menu bar app that shows your upcoming calendar events
Stage: Mid-development
Tech stack: Swift + SwiftUI, EventKit

## Collaboration Rhythm
Checkpoint mode: AI breaks tasks into steps, waits before each.

[CONTEXT.md content]
# Orbit — Current State
> Last updated: 2026-04-08

## What's Been Completed
- Menu bar icon and popover window working
- EventKit integration — can read events
- Basic event list display

## In Progress
- Event detail view (tap to expand)

## Next Steps
- [ ] Event detail view
- [ ] Refresh interval setting
- [ ] Launch at login toggle

[DECISIONS.md content]
| T-1 | Swift + SwiftUI only | Native macOS feel | 2026-04-01 |
| T-2 | No backend | Local EventKit only, no sync | 2026-04-01 |
| V-1 | Minimal UI — no colors except system defaults | Blend with macOS aesthetic | 2026-04-05 |

Okay, let's add the refresh interval setting today.

assertions.name: AI enters maintenance mode automatically
assertions.text: AI reads the provided docs and summarizes project state without asking user to explain it

assertions.name: AI follows checkpoint rhythm
assertions.text: AI breaks the refresh interval task into numbered steps and asks for confirmation

assertions.name: AI respects existing decisions (no backend)
assertions.text: AI does not propose a backend or remote sync feature (would conflict with T-2)

assertions.name: AI does not ask user to re-explain
assertions.text: AI first response does not ask what the project is or what has been done
